MASTER JURY CALENDAR OF AUG-15-2022 -- APPEARANCES BY KAREL ROCHA, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF THE GOLDEN 1 CREDIT UNION; STEPHANIE TATAR, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT JUSTIN HO -- ASSIGNED TO JURY TRIAL CALENDAR ON AUG-15-2022 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 608, JUDGE GERARDO C. SANDOVAL. PARTIES WERE ORDERED TO CONTACT DEPT. 608 BY E-MAIL BY 4:00 PM ON 8/19/22 AND THE CLERK'S PHONE NUMBER WAS ALSO PROVIDED. ANY MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE SHALL BE HEARD IN DEPT. 206, PER JUDGE FENG. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 EACH, PAYABLE BY AUG-25-2022, ARE IMPOSED ON ATTY. KAREL ROCHA AND ATTY. STEPHANIE TATAR FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ARE SET FOR BOTH ATTYS ON AUG-26-2022 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. OSCS WILL BE DISCHARGED IF SANCTIONS ARE PAID PRIOR TO THE HEARING DATE. TRIAL TIME ESTIMATE: 3-4 DAYS. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-01-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Jason Meyer, Esq, for Plaintiff Golden 1 Credit Union
Lauren Veggian, Esq. for Defendant Justin Ho
Maria A. Torrenao, Court reporter, CSR #8600

DEFENDANT JUSTIN HO's Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment

Plaintiff contests the Court's tentative ruling. Tenative ruling is discussesd.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Justin Ho's motion to set aside default is granted on the basis of lack of actual notice.

"When service of a summons has not resulted in actual notice to a party in time to defend the action and a default or default judgment has been entered against him or her in the action, he or she may serve and file a notice of motion to set aside the default or default judgment and for leave to defend the action." (Code Civ. Proc. 473.5) Defendant testifies that he did not become aware of the lawsuit until October or November of 2020, when he was able to review mail he received at his parents' home. (Ho Decl., 5, 10, 15-16.) Defendant further testifies that he was not avoiding service. (Id. 12.) Plaintiff does not provide any admissible evidence that controverts Defendants' declarations that substituted service on June 17, 2020 did not result in actual notice.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/EPS)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

Off Calendar May-12-2021 Continued To Jun-17-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-26-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT JUSTIN HO's Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Matter is off calendar. Plaintiff did not serve and file the motion at least 16 court days before the hearing (plus two days for service by e-mail), as required by Code of Civil Procedure section 1005(b).

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
